<?php namespace Illuminate\Broadcasting; class FakePendingBroadcast extends PendingBroadcast { /** * Create a new pending broadcast instance. */ public function __construct() { // } /** * Broadcast the event using a specific broadcaster. * * @param string|null $connection * @return $this */ public function via($connection = null) { return $this; } /** * Broadcast the event to everyone except the current user. * * @return $this */ public function toOthers() { return $this; } /** * Handle the object's destruction. * * @return void */ public function __destruct() { // } }
